must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet: Proposed acquisition by Zamrud Data Berhad (listed on the Bursa Kencana Main Market) of 80% of CyCloud Nusantara Sdn Bhd from Orkid Capital Sdn Bhd, with concurrent MYR 80,000,000 convertible sukuk al-Murabaha issuance.

Term Sheet: Proposed acquisition by Zamrud Data Berhad (listed on the Bursa Kencana Main Market) of 80% of CyCloud Nusantara Sdn Bhd from Orkid Capital Sdn Bhd, with concurrent MYR 80,000,000 convertible sukuk al-Murabaha issuance.
Purchase consideration: MYR 220,000,000 cash on completion plus earn-out of up to MYR 30,000,000 tied to FY2027 EBITDA and carbon-intensity reduction targets under the Company’s climate plan.
Convertible sukuk terms: 6.0% profit rate per annum, 5-year tenor, convertible at MYR 1.85 per new ordinary share of Zamrud Data Berhad, subject to customary adjustments.
Conditions precedent: approvals from Suruhanjaya Pasaran Modal Nusantara and Bursa Kencana, third-party consent for the renewable PPA at CyCloud Green Park, and no material adverse cyber event post-signing.
Non-public matters: CyCloud suffered a contained ransomware incident on 14 May 2026 with no customer data exfiltration; the incident report and forensic logs are in the virtual data room and are not for external circulation.
Digital asset initiative: CyCloud is piloting a ringgit-linked token settlement rail for enterprise micro-payments under a regulatory sandbox; the pilot and pricing are confidential and not yet announced.
ESG linkage: Zamrud Data Berhad intends to classify the sukuk as “green” based on CyCloud’s 80% renewable energy mix and planned Scope 2 reductions; second-party opinion in draft form only.
Information handling: An insider list will be maintained by the Company Secretary including Dato’ Farah Azmi (CFO) and Encik Hafiz Rahman (Head of M&A); add/remove entries only via compliance@zamruddata.test.
Information barriers: Deal team communications are restricted to the Clean Team; no tipping or selective disclosure to analysts or vendors, and a trading blackout applies to all Designated Persons from signing until public announcement.
Announcement: Subject to confidentiality carve-outs, the Company will make a market announcement to Bursa Kencana within one market day of executing definitive agreements, or earlier if unusual market activity arises.
Exclusivity and break fee: 45-day exclusivity from the date of this term sheet; seller break fee of MYR 6,000,000 payable if seller accepts a competing proposal during exclusivity.
Employee matters: Key employees, including Puan Siti Zulaikha Musa (CTO of CyCloud), will enter 24-month retention and non-solicit undertakings; no change to existing ESOS until completion.
Operational note: The HR learning portal will run a general “insider list and crypto vocabulary 101” webinar for staff education, which is routine training and not related to any pending transaction or MNPI.
Documentation: SPA, subscription agreement, and green framework to reflect W&I insurance, no-shop, customary warranties, and a covenant to remediate identified cyber gaps within 120 days post-completion.
Confidentiality and data: All parties agree to Malaysian PDPA-compliant handling of personal data; access to “Cyber-IR17” and “ESG-WP3” folders in the data room is limited to named individuals under the information barrier.
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation
